Fixes cURL error 60 (missing CA certific: Fixes cURL error 60 (missing CA certificate bundle) for local installations. Enables a TLS bypass so outbound license verification requests succeed when your host lacks a valid CA trust store.

For Redis, use the :redis1 or :redis2 te: For Redis, use the :redis1 or :redis2 template in the Templates tab for a dedicated browser UI. For MongoDB, use :mongo.
For standard/SSH deploys, this is the lo: For standard/SSH deploys, this is the local build path. For FTP-only deploys, this is the remote subdirectory appended to FTP Root Path (:ftpPath/:localPath), and builds run in a managed workspace. If FTP Root Path is blank and Local Path starts with :slash, it is treated as an absolute remote path.
FTP does not support symlinks, so :link: FTP does not support symlinks, so :link will be created as a plain directory on the remote rather than a symlink to :storage.
